overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in red clothing walking through a vibrant futuristic city. The character navigates from a covered commercial walkway with neon advertisements through sunlit plazas and up colorful stairs to an elevated pedestrian walkway beneath a massive highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon advertisements

events.description: entering covered passage between blue cylindrical building and adjacent structure

agents.ego_description: walking along curved street past rotating advertisement tower toward covered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the covered passage

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with rotating digital advertisement screens displaying various products
large illuminated sign with neon graphics and text reading 'PURE OVERKILL'
green vending machine with 'BURRITO' signage and product display
blue arched architectural structure forming a covered passage between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved urban street dominated by a massive cylindrical advertisement tower displaying rotating neon commercials. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with red neon strips and a blue building facade. The character approaches and enters a covered walkway passage, passing a green vending machine and a seated NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with corporate buildings and trees

events.description: exiting covered passage into bright midday sunlight causing exposure shift
turning left to follow plaza pathway toward elevated area

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered passage and walking through sunlit plaza with scattered trees and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket walking ahead in the plaza toward the distant arch

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with blue neon 'DATA INC' signage near the top
green leafy trees planted in large containers providing shade
massive rectangular archway formed between two distant skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered passage into a bright sunlit plaza, causing a dramatic lighting change from shaded neon to natural daylight. The Data Inc building rises on the left with its distinctive blue signage, while trees and planters dot the open space. The character walks toward a distant architectural arch visible between the skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial plaza with red seating planters and food vendors

events.description: ascending red stairs to upper plaza level
approaching food vendor cart with visible steam and cooking equipment

agents.ego_description: walking up red stairs and through crowded plaza area with various NPCs and street vendors

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind red cart preparing items
person in red outfit walking ahead toward the purple stairs

entered.detail: large cylindrical red planters with trees and integrated seating
red mobile food vendor cart with cooking equipment and boxes
wide staircase with distinctive purple steps and bright blue side walls
massive concrete elevated highway structure with multiple lanes

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through a bustling plaza featuring distinctive red cylindrical planters with integrated seating. After ascending red stairs to an upper level, the character approaches a food vendor cart where an NPC is working. The massive elevated highway becomes visible on the right, while ahead lies a striking purple staircase leading to an even higher pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with palm trees

events.description: climbing purple stairs to upper level
reaching top of stairs and entering upper pedestrian walkway beneath overpass

agents.ego_description: climbing the purple stairs and walking along the upper pedestrian walkway beneath the highway

notable_agents.action: person descending the purple stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the elevated walkway in blue planters
massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the walkway
blue concrete bench seating along the walkway railing

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the distinctive purple staircase with blue walls, passing another pedestrian coming down. Upon reaching the top, the scene transitions to an elevated pedestrian walkway shaded by a massive concrete highway overpass. Palm trees and blue benches line the walkway as the character continues forward beneath the shadow of the infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant futuristic city, transitioning from a shaded neon corridor into a sunlit plaza and finally up to a shadowed elevated walkway. It begins along a curved urban street dominated by a massive cylindrical advertisement tower, moving past red neon strips and a blue facade before entering a covered walkway passage. As the character emerges from the passage, the lighting shifts dramatically from shaded neon to bright natural daylight within an open plaza featuring the Data Inc building and scattered greenery. The scene then expands through a bustling area of red cylindrical planters and red stairs, passing a food vendor as a massive elevated highway comes into view. Finally, the camera ascends a striking purple staircase to reach a high pedestrian walkway, where the environment transitions back into the cool shadow of a concrete highway overpass lined with palm trees and blue benches.
